channel.title: Aboutme on Scepter914 Website
channel.description: Recent content in Aboutme on Scepter914 Website

item.title: 自己紹介
item.description: Profile 田中 敬(たなか さとし) 東京大学大学院 情報理工学研究科 創造情報学専攻 M2 石川妹尾研究室 Biography Academic background 2014⁄04-2018⁄03 東京大学 理科1類 → 工学部精密工学科(神保小谷研究

item.title: About me
item.description: 日本語ページ Profile Satoshi Tanaka Ishikawa Senoo Lab M2, Department of Creative Informatics, Graduate School of Information Science and Technology, The University of Tokyo Biography Academic background 2018⁄04-Now Ishikawa Senoo Lab, Department of Creative Informatics, Graduate School of Information Science and Technology 2014⁄04-2018⁄03 Dept. of Precison Engineering, The University of Tokyo 2017⁄04-2018⁄03 Kotani Lab, Research Center for Advanced Sceience and Technology Work Experience Internship 2018⁄04-2019⁄04 Internship

item.title: Interest
item.description: Soccer I have played soccer for over 15 years. I play as attacker, mainly Second Top and Side Midfielder. History I like Romance of the Three Kingdoms(三国志) and the age of provincial wars in Japan(戦国時代). As a person, I like Du Yu(杜預)

item.title: 趣味
item.description: サッカー 幼稚園〜大学と長くやってるスポーツ ボランチ→トップ下→サイドハーフ→ウイング 大学のサークル HotSpurs 21期 歴史 三国志 魏推し 人物: 杜預, 曹操,
